---
title: "Sample Platforms"
description-meta: "Sample deployed platforms by Prof. Ibrahim Niankara for teaching, research, community engagement, and commercialization."
toc: true
---

This page showcases sample platforms deployed for teaching, research, community engagement, and commercialization.

## Teaching

Platform developed for teaching the undergraduate course *Statistics for Business Decision Making*.

::: {.container}
<iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="https://brassbe1982-statisticsforbusiness.share.connect.posit.cloud/" title="Statistics for Business Decision Making teaching platform" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

## Research

Platform developed for research and teaching the DBA course *Advanced Economics of Strategy*.

::: {.container}
<iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="https://brassbe1982-econstrategydba.share.connect.posit.cloud/" title="Advanced Economics of Strategy DBA research platform" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

## Community Engagement

Platform developed for the UAE Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) analysis.

::: {.container}
<iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="https://brassbe1982-cepauae.share.connect.posit.cloud/" title="UAE CEPA analysis community engagement platform" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

## Commercialization

### Edu-RegTech Platform

Platform developed for Outcome-based Framework Evaluation in the UAE higher education sector.

::: {.container}
<iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="https://brassbe1982.shinyapps.io/BRASS-DIGITAL-LAB-AUD-OBF-VERS9/" title="Edu-RegTech Outcome-based Framework Evaluation platform" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

### Edu-SupTech Platform

Platform developed for Outcome-based Framework Evaluation in the UAE higher education sector.

::: {.container}
<iframe class="responsive-iframe" src="https://brassbe1982.shinyapps.io/BRASS-DIGITAL-LAB-MoHESR-CAA-OBF-V01/" title="Edu-SupTech Outcome-based Framework Evaluation platform" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::
